page.title: Advanced Captain Manager Texts
page.t: Automatically assigns the best available pilots based on ship size (XL > L > M > S) and purpose (Fight > Trade > Mine > Build).
Dismisses the captains and leaves them as unassigned crew.
This ship has no captain to unassign.
Immediately fires and removes the captains.
This ship has no captain to fire.
Captains have been assigned to %1 empty ships.
